element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Single-player campaign against CPU opponents of increasing difficulty
Each of seven characters has specialized set of three attack moves and abilities
Brief moment allowed after victory to perform finishing move; each character has three variants
Eating opponent worshippers adds score bonus; eating own worshippers penalizes player; regains health
Player given opportunity to eat worshippers to increase health pool for final multi-opponent round
Fight all other monsters sequentially with increased power bar from minigame preparation
Human volleyball and bowling minigames accessible through specific trigger conditions

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Progressive escalation from single matches to CPU-controlled opponents of increasing difficulty, culminating in multi-opponent endurance round at highest difficulty levels

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Seven distinct background stages corresponding to character domains; each stage represents innate domain of specific character
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Easter egg minigames triggered through human-controlled character interactions; hidden developer credits and debugging material in ROM

difficulty_curve.early_game: Initial CPU opponents present manageable difficulty; basic special moves and health mechanics introduced
difficulty_curve.mid_game: CPU opponent difficulty increases progressively through campaign; character matchups become more challenging
difficulty_curve.late_game: Difficulty level 10+ unlocks final endurance battle requiring player to fight all other monsters sequentially with enhanced opponent power bars
notable_spikes: Progression to higher difficulty levels introduces CPU opponents with increased power bars
Final endurance battle represents dramatic difficulty spike: multiple sequential fights with enhanced opponent stats

notable_level_patterns.description: Seven distinct background environments, each representing one character's innate thematic domain (Cliff, Hollows, Strip, Cove, Ruins, Tomb, Inferno)
Single-player campaign features CPU opponents of increasing difficulty; difficulty setting unlocks harder opponent configurations and final endurance battle at level 10+
Human tribesmen wander stages during fights; players can toss or consume them for health recovery and score modifications
Pre-final-battle minigame grants player opportunity to maximize health pool before endurance round through worshipper consumption
